title: Master of Islamic Sharia
faculty: Faculty of Sharia and Islamic Studies
program_description: Official master's degree in Islamic Sharia granted by the Faculty of Sharia and Islamic Studies. The faculty page explicitly lists the master's degree and its specializations.
concentrations_or_tracks: الفقه وأصوله / فقه المعاملات المالية والمصرفية الإسلامية
admission_requirements: Official master's admissions page with published master's requirements, admission conditions, required documents, study-system details, registration procedures, and thesis or non-thesis track rules for the Sharia section.
notes: The faculty page explicitly states that the college grants master's degrees in Islamic Sharia. The admissions page confirms master's study rules and thesis/non-thesis tracks; no dedicated program-detail URL beyond the faculty page was recovered.

title: Doctor of Philosophy in Islamic Sharia
faculty: Faculty of Sharia and Islamic Studies
program_description: Official doctoral degree in Islamic Sharia granted by the Faculty of Sharia and Islamic Studies. The faculty page explicitly lists the doctoral degree and its specializations.
concentrations_or_tracks: الفقه وأصوله / فقه المعاملات المالية والمصرفية الإسلامية
admission_requirements: Official PhD admissions page with published doctoral requirements, admission conditions, master's equivalency, faculty-specific conditions, required documents, registration procedures, and the 42-credit-hour dissertation structure.
notes: The doctoral admissions page states that doctoral study requires at least 42 credit hours, including 30 credit hours for the dissertation and defense. The faculty page explicitly states that the college grants doctoral degrees in Islamic Sharia.
